function.description: Functional coverage for start, clear, enabled countdown, hold, and done pulse behavior.

bins.description: clear returns all observable state to idle.
terminal enabled tick asserts done for one pulse.

cycle.description: Cycle coverage for reset, start-load latency, enabled tick latency, hold cycles, and terminal done timing.

bins.description: start result is visible on the next clock edge.
terminal countdown tick drives done timing.
